ogTitle: Estella vs Ettalong Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Estella and Ettalong Beach.
heading: Estella vs Ettalong Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Estella, New South Wales and Ettalong Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Estella has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Ettalong Beach (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Estella or Ettalong Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Estella has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Ettalong Beach scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Estella scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Ettalong Beach scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Estella or Ettalong Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Estella has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
